common.appDescription: Atlas — an AI operating system for everyday life assistance.

routing.noDecisionRecorded: No decision was recorded for this request.

login.title: Sign in to Atlas
login.subtitle: Use the seeded demo account, or your own credentials.

hero.title: What would you like to accomplish today?
hero.subtitle: Atlas will turn it into a plan and get moving.
hero.placeholder: Remind me to plan my trip to Tokyo next month
examples: Schedule a dentist appointment for next week
I need to renew my passport before my trip
Remind me to book flights for my Tokyo trip
Draft a packing checklist for the weekend trip

compact.title: Start another mission
compact.placeholder: What would you like to accomplish?

missions.title: Your missions
missions.status: {activeCount} in progress{blockedCount, plural, =0 { · nothing waiting on you} other { · # waiting on you}}

decision.workingOn: Atlas is currently working on: {title}. Status: {status}.

why.label: Why:
why.pickingUp: Picking up where you left off.

actions.notePlaceholder: Add a note about how this wrapped up...

updateInput.heading: Add an update
updateInput.placeholder: What's the latest on this mission?

currentFocus.needsField: Atlas needs {field, select, dueDate {a due date} intent {a bit more detail about what you're trying to do} other {more information}} to keep going.
currentFocus.stillNeedsField: Thanks — Atlas still needs {field, select, dueDate {a due date} intent {a bit more detail about what you're trying to do} other {more information}} to keep going.
currentFocus.nothingPending: Nothing pending — ready for your next update.
currentFocus.doneDeclined: Done — a different outcome was recorded.

evidence.title: Evidence
evidence.count: {count, plural, =0 {No evidence yet} one {# item} other {# items}}
evidence.insufficientEvidence: Atlas needs more information before making a recommendation.

fromMemory.empty: You don't have any memories yet.

fromDocument.empty: You don't have any documents yet.
fromDocument.excerptPlaceholder: Paste or type the exact excerpt to attach

fromCalendar.empty: No upcoming events on your calendar.
fromCalendar.reconnectRequired: Your Google Calendar connection needs to be reconnected.
fromCalendar.unavailable: Your calendar is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

opportunity.title: Opportunities
opportunity.reasonWaitingOn: Waiting on {field, select, dueDate {a due date} intent {a bit more detail about what you're trying to do} other {more information}}.

page.title: Axis
page.subtitle: Raw pipeline access, outside any mission. For everyday use, start from Home.

input.placeholder: Try "Remind me to call the bank tomorrow" or "Remember that I like oat milk"

axis.noResults: No requests yet — try one above.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Saved from your requests — nothing summarized, always your own words.

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: External connections Atlas can use.
providers.readOnlyNote: Read-only — Atlas can see your events but can never create, edit, or delete them.

errors.state: Something went wrong verifying that request. Please try connecting again.
errors.exchangeFailed: Couldn't complete the Google Calendar connection. Please try again.

googleCalendar.liveDataLabel: Live data from your Google Calendar.

events.reconnectRequired: Google Calendar access needs to be reconnected.

weather.noLocation: No location configured yet — set one below to see the weather.
weather.unavailable: Weather data is unavailable right now.

locationForm.notFound: Couldn't find that city. Try a different spelling or a larger nearby city.
locationForm.unavailable: Couldn't look up that city right now. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: How Atlas Brain has been reasoning.

planStep.askDueDate: Ask the user for a due date
planStep.clarifyRequest: Ask the user to clarify the request
planStep.initState: Initialize Atlas State for this user

routingReasoning.task: Detected a task-creation phrase, so the Task module will draft a new task{hasDueDate, select, yes { due {dueDate}} other {}}.{isDuplicate, select, yes { An open task with the same title already exists, so confidence is lowered.} other {}}
routingReasoning.memory: Detected a statement about the user, so Atlas Brain will store it as a memory.
routingReasoning.document: Detected a save/write request, so the Document module will create a draft note.
routingReasoning.shopping: Detected a shopping-comparison request, so the Shopping module will compare the named options.
routingReasoning.conversation: Detected a question, so the Conversation module will handle it directly.
routingReasoning.unknown: No module matched this request with enough confidence, so Atlas Brain will ask for clarification.

axisSummary.task: Create a task: "{subject}"{hasDueDate, select, yes { (due {dueDate})} other {}}

findLowestValue.recommendationCurrency: Based on the available evidence, "{claim}" currently has the lowest observed value: {value} {currency}.
findLowestValue.recommendationNumeric: Based on the available evidence, "{claim}" currently has the lowest observed value: {value}.
findLowestValue.reasoning: {count, plural, one {Compared # comparable piece of evidence.} other {Compared # comparable pieces of evidence.}}

compareOptions.reasoning: {count, plural, one {Compared across # option.} other {Compared across # options.}}
